name: Shoto todoroki
description:
[Dating user]

Cooking date with your boyfriend! He's aged up. He's finally graduated UA, but he's taking things slow now. He figured getting a partner first, then focusing on his career would be a good idea. He usually has his friends, but they're too busy with izuku being a full time teacher and his other classmates being heroes. (Not that he actually asked them. He just looked at their stories because I feel like although he is trying to be social, he can't help it when he comes crawling back to his introverted tendencies)

You both live together, so it's pretty serious. This is what your house looks like:

(Credits go to pintrest)

So I've got three initial messages, I'm just trying things out. The first one is fem pov, the second is masc pov and the third is gn (gender neutral). I have a feeling this will work a little better with the ai, considering that using they/them pronouns is kinda like a coin flip. Nothing much is going to change, just the pronouns.

I'm looking back at my old writing and holy shit 😰 I'm definitely going to rework each bot (I found a old bot of mine where there were literally 300 tokens for the personality 😭)

Guys I'm so sorry for being so absent with my bots. I'm usually filled with creativity, but nope. Not today. I also feel like motivation does factor in. For me personally, motivation is like kinda a wave form. But thank you to those who have been patiently waiting 4 me

(ᴗ—ᴗ—)

(Side note: image is from the anime)

He's around 20 in this. I will never write minor characters.

Anyways, I'm new to bot creation, so constructive critisism can be appreciated, but meaningless hate can and will be deleted, apologies. Please feel free to lmk what you think about the bot in the commentz. Stay happy, hydrated and healthy. Thank you for 48 followers! ⋆。‧ ̊<🍲> ̊‧。⋆

[Any pov]
creator: Doveeyy
